caption: A wide shot depicts a large assembly of people seated in a tiered lecture hall or conference room with wood-paneled walls. The attendees are predominantly men dressed in a variety of formal attire, including dark business suits with ties and traditional Middle Eastern clothing, such as white thobes and ghutras. The people are seated in rows, facing forward, and appear to be listening attentively. Some individuals are leaning slightly or shifting in their seats, but they remain generally stationary. On the far left and right edges of the scene, partial views of blue digital screens are visible. The scene remains consistent across the sequence, with only subtle movements among the audience members and no changes in camera position, lighting, or the overall environment. There is no visible on-screen text or logos.
